Title: mathjs Allows Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes
Description: Two security vulnerabilities, the first of which was introduced in version 13.1.0, were detected that allowed executing arbitrary JavaScript via the expression parser of mathjs. You can be affected when you have an application where users can evaluate arbitrary expressions using the mathjs expression parser.
NotImpacted: All versions before 13.1.0, all versions starting from 15.2.0
